entries.phrase: 請修正 sanguo-rag relationship pipeline 的 kinship / spouse 誤判規則，避免把第三人稱家庭描述、婚配計策與 spouse/direct pair 混在一起；只改 build_relationship_claim_graph.py、relationship_type_refinement.py，必要時補 run_relationship_semantic_review_cache.py 與 export_general_runtime_profile.py，並重建相關 runtime artifacts。
entries.normalizedPhrase: 請修正 sanguo-rag relationship pipeline 的 kinship / spouse 誤判規則 避免把第三人稱家庭描述 婚配計策與 spouse/direct pair 混在一起 只改 build_relationship_claim_graph py relationship_type_refinement py 必要時補 run_relationship_semantic_review_cache py 與 export_general_runtime_profile py 並重建相關 runtime artifacts
entries.reason: Guidance Drift Police observed a missed candidate-ranking phrase.
